narrative:
Mahoning County has 153,219 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.5% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +11.8% D−R vs +27.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
